content: What is a good team for helot catena
E2 Thais is way more important than everything else, honestly... then you can bring Aigis and whatever fourth character you've got.

Monowil is Tawil, Ryker, Karen, Hameln, but requires a bit of invest(I only know E2 Tawil and the rest I forgor the enlightenment reqs). Bluewil is Tawil Hameln Caecus and I forgor the last, or its flex any

If its a standard selector, and not a proto, then you can probably use them on anyone… really… You can either spend them to get a certain enlightenment you want NOW. You can spend them to OE(E3 and +4) a unit. You can also just use them on characters your not pulling for on your current standard banners realm, but want the enlightenment for.
I.E: If you want Nautila E3, but you’re pulling on Aequor Standard Banner

General use, I think Tawil E2, followed by Clementine are the best in this selection. Using protoparadises on standard characters because you don't want to pull on that banner requires the knowledge that you never want to pull on a~~n Ultra~~ particular banner again because ~~if Tinct appears in your fucking presence one more time you're swearing vengeance on the stars~~ you don't want any more copies of those standard awakers

and, like, at the point where you decide to stop pulling standard characters because you want to make well informed decisions, you're also generally at the point where you have to develop the insight of ten thousand mortal sages by working in the wheel of destiny mines until you have received a couple dozen copies of Blade of the Titan and Incalculable Factor

Not a expert.
Thais can help you scale faster, but you don’t dupe any “key big damage burst” cards.
Winkle can work with more exalts = more onyx plumes or sacred hearts.
Clementine can work for burst turn. 
All give skey, so they all work well as supports.
You can mix Chaos realm units, but I don’t see a BIG reason to. Maybe Ogier(Str Stack + Big Shield + 2 turn Vuln) or Ryker (Crit Dmg Stack, Card Finder, RNG Vuln and Weak). However, Castor already gives massive shields, and Ryker’s ability to card find doesn’t really matter. Maybe finding a “Stygian Wing” can clutch, but *eh*.
Oh and Clem helps with survivability, that too.
Heal + Dmg Down

That’s completely fine. Thais can work as accelerator for other factors(Caecus Shattering Counter Gen, Hameln Memory Rewondo Insight Gen). Hell, she can duplicate her own cards with lots of value. She can duplicate her own card to generate Aliemus for herself and another unit to accelerate Exalts. She can duplicate her other card to stack weakness, vulnerable, or MORE embryos.
Along with skey on her other card as well.
Skey(Silver Key: Used for Posse)
Oh yea, Thais works well with Salv, if ya got him(Just including more uses for Thais~)

If it’s the final boss, I would not recommend Cantena. Imo, she kills you too quickly while her burst card doesn’t matter since the boss has 90% dmg reduction until you kill all serpents. You would want survivability and aoe. You can argue Cantena has “AOE” via her three recast, hit two RANDOM targets, but that’s the caveat(it’s random, you hit Miryam, take dmg no matter what). When you have a higher lvl account for more max hp to survive her killing herself, then she is easier to run.

I would recommend Salvador and Pickman as main two Awakeners. Both have AOE guranteed. Salvador deals, shields, heals. Pickman is a really solid support as he can do a bit of everything(str gen, embryo gen, aoe dmg, dmg amp, healing).

Then flex last two slots for Nautila, Aigis, Clem, or Faint. Nautila generates alot of shield due to her rouse and her base stats. Aigis can save you with a only one turn petrify, which can come in clutch sometimes. Clem can dmg down, and heal. Faint can give you DR(Death Resistance) which allows you to survive hits on death’s door. You can see what I’m getting at for these last two slots, defensive, survival.
HOLY SHIT I LOVE UOU THIS IS SO HELPFUL
I’ve got more, lemme type <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>

For Nautila, with her E3, you can become immune to the debuffs she puts at the beggining of the fight, but yours is E1. Clem is E0 making her harder to utilize. I would still recommend Nautila due to her base stats and rouse for big shields. Faint works perfectly at E0 and same for Aigis.
For wheels, Salvadors talent, which if I remember right, you want Sigil on your WoDs for larger furnace which is your healing and shielding and dmg on Salvador.
For Pickman, you can go Skey generation or Aliemus generation for Posses or more Exalts.

For Nautila, you can go any WoDs that say “Increase Shielding”
For Faint, you want DR WoDs as that allows her to further increase your DR cap with her Exalts.
For Aigis, go Skey generation for more Posses. Aliemus gen isn’t recommended since you can only stun ONCE per fight.

On any of your two flex awakeners or even Pickman, go “Gluttony” and “Frenzy”, the brown/R WoDs. “Frenzy” is broken because it allows you to buy cursed relics in shops. Cursed relics, as you should know by now, are stupidly broken.

“Gluttony” allows you to forgo a rest spot(I think, I havent used it in a while), and increase your max hp.  In Caro Realm, the amount you can heal from your Furnace scales with your Hp, so you understands how that works with “Gluttony”. FURTHERMORE, this is even more beneficial cause of Salvador. Salvador’s damage, shielding, and healing all scale off of your Furnace amount. “Gluttony” has 2x the benefit in Caro with Salvador.
Gimme a moment, Ill give ya a Ramona team(which is pretty much the same, lol)
OH YEA, you can also go Caecus. Reason is solely because his stats are stupidly high. His CON stat which is very high helps scale your max Hp even further.
For Salvador.
Ramona team… mhmmmmmmmm
I think the same rhetoric should work. Just make one of the two flex awakeners, Ramona. Then that should work.
For the final boss, focus more on staying alive, and when you have a AOE from Salv or Pick, then weight the scales. If you can survive, kill the serpents, if you can’t, then focus on surviving.
